resignation_approve_date.text: วันที่บันทึก

RESIGN_DOC_NO.text: เลขที่คำขอ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.RESIGN_DATE ,sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO) as memname ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, localtimestamp) as agetext ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBER_GROUP_NO ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.MEMBER_GROUP_NAME ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.REMARK ,sc_mem_m_resign_share.SHR_VALUE --,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.DIFFERENT_SHARELOAN ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as group_control_name ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.RESIGN_DOC_NO ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.RESIGN_CODE ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.RESIGNATION_APPROVE_DATE ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.KEEPING_GROUP ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.mem_type ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.sex
,(select sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no_ref from sc_mem_m_member_member_refer where SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no_ref like '02%') as membership_no_ref
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment ,sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_PRENAME ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP ,sc_mem_m_resign_share WHERE (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.RESIGN_CODE = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code) AND (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO = SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBERSHIP_NO) AND (SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.PRENAME_CODE = SC_MEM_M_UCF_PRENAME.PRENAME_CODE) AND (SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBER_GROUP_NO = SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.MEMBER_GROUP_NO) AND (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.RESIGN_DOC_NO = sc_mem_m_resign_share.RESIGN_DOC_NO) AND (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result <> '0') and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status <> '1' and sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code in ('1108','1109')
/*WHERE*/
order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.MEMBERSHIP_NO asc

r_tnma_member_resign_renew_nest_loncoll.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) AS membername FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no) AND (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ={0}) AND (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.STATUS = '0') AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 OR sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no IN ( SELECT sc_atm_lon_card.loan_contract_no FROM sc_atm_lon_card WHERE sc_atm_lon_card.modify_status <> 'C' ) ) ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ASC

r_tnma_member_resign_case1108_nestloan.sql: select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance from sc_lon_m_loan_card where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0
